arts.ttl: ‘Massive problems’: Paul Merson says Arsenal would be scary if they signed £60m player
arts.sum: Arsenal are having some problems in front of goals recently. The Gunners have failed to score from open play in any of their last three...

arts.ttl: Arsenal are handed major injury boost ahead of Crystal Palace clash as TWO key stars are deemed fit to play by manager Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The Spaniard was speaking on the day which marked his five years as Arsenal manager. While he was proud of his achievements, he is also targeting silverware.

arts.ttl: ‘They need more’: Jamie Carragher names the three players Arsenal need to upgrade on now
arts.sum: Arsenal are still in the mix in the Premier League title race, but they need to improve if they are to win the league. Gary...

arts.ttl: 'My body's breaking' - Ex-Palace & Newcastle striker Gayle to retire
arts.sum: Hibernian forward Dwight Gayle says his "body is breaking down" and he intends to retire as a player at the end of this season.

arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko Arsenal transfer update reveals two clear rivals for signature
arts.sum: However, Sesko decided to commit his long-term future to Leipzig and sign a five-year contract until the summer of 2029. The exact fee that Leipzig demand is unclear but it's looking increasingly unlikely that Sesko will stay at the German club beyond the end of next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta focused on present and not long-term future at Arsenal
arts.sum: Arteta took over a struggling 10th-placed side three weeks after Unai Emery had been sacked.

arts.ttl: The key quotes from Glasner's pre-Arsenal press conference
arts.sum: Crystal Palace face Arsenal for the second time in three days on Saturday; ahead of the game, find out what manager Oliver Glasner had to say below.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta breaks silence on Kieran Tierney exit rumours as Arsenal transfer truth revealed
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta insists that Kieran Tierney has not asked to leave Arsenal in January amid rumours that Celtic are plotting a move to re-sign the Scotsman.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta can field dream Arsenal defence as triple injury boost confirmed for Crystal Palace clash
arts.sum: Riccardo Calafiori, Oleksandr Zinchenko and Declan Rice are all expected to be available for Arsenal's Premier League clash with Crystal Palace on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms triple Arsenal injury boost ahead of Crystal Palace clash
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta provides Arsenal injury updates on Declan Rice, Riccardo Calafiori and Oleksandr Zinchenko.
